name: HYCROFT MINING HOLDING CORP
business: We are a U.S.-based gold and silver exploration stage issuer that owns the Hycroft Mine in the prolific mining region of Northern Nevada. We do not expect revenues from gold and silver sales until restarting mining operations.

exposures.sentence: We are a U.S.-based gold and silver exploration stage issuer that owns the Hycroft Mine in the prolific mining region of Northern Nevada.

catalysts.event: Filing of 2026 Hycroft TRS technical report
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, Hycroft, along with its third-party consultants, completed and filed the Hycroft Mine Initial Assessment and Technical Report Summary, Nevada, USA with an effective date of January 21, 2026.
On October 15, 2025, the Company made payments totaling $125.5 million to fully extinguish its remaining debt, including accrued interest.

catalysts.event: Notice of required exercise of private placement warrants
catalysts.sentence: After satisfying the conditions for a Required Exercise under the 2025 Private Placement Warrant Agreement, Hycroft issued the Notice of Required Exercise of Common Stock Purchase Warrant to the remaining Private Placement warrant holders on December 14, 2025.
The 2025-2026 Drill Program began in early August 2025.
In September 2025, the Company entered into an Equipment Purchase Agreement to sell one Ball Mill for $4.0 million, before commissions and expenses.

tamClaims.claim: Global gold demand in 2025 was approximately 5,002 metric tons (or 160.8 million troy ounces) and totaled approximately $552 billion in value.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the World Gold Council, gold demand in 2025 was approximately 5,002 metric tons (or 160.8 million troy ounces) and totaled approximately $552 billion in value.

tamClaims.claim: Global gold mine production in 2025 was approximately 3,672 metric tons (or 118.0 million troy ounces), representing 73.4% of total supply.
tamClaims.sentence: Based on publicly available information published by the World Gold Council, gold from mine production increased 1% in 2025 compared with 2024 totaling approximately 3,672 metric tons (or 118.0 million troy ounces) and represented approximately 73.4% of the 2025 global gold supply of 5,002 metric tons.

tamClaims.claim: Global silver demand in 2025 was approximately 1,148 million troy ounces and totaled approximately $36.1 billion in value.
tamClaims.sentence: Silver demand in 2025 was approximately 1,148 million troy ounces and totaled approximately $36.1 billion in value.

tamClaims.claim: Global silver mine production in 2025 was approximately 1,031 million troy ounces, representing 81% of total supply.
tamClaims.sentence: Based on publicly available information, estimated silver from mine production increased approximately 2% in 2025 compared with 2024, totaling approximately 1,031 million troy ounces, and represented approximately 81% of the 2025 global silver supply of 1,031 million troy ounces.
